name: SEO Keyword Tracker
description: SEO Keyword Tracker - Marketing template for channels professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template Step 1: Build Your Keyword List Go to the Keyword Tracker tab. Enter every keyword you want to rank for — branded, non-branded, long-tail, short-tail. One row per keyword. Step 2: Classify Each Keyword Use the dropdowns to categorize: Intent (Informational, Navigational, Commercial, Transactional), Priority (High, Medium, Low), and Status (Tracking, Optimizing, Ranking, Won). Step 3: Add Monthly Rankings Each month, update your current ranking in the monthly columns (M1–M12). The Dashboard auto-calculates movement and trends. Step 4: Track Competitors Use the Competito

sections.title: Competitor Tracker

fields.helpText: Track how you rank vs competitors on your target keywords.
